subcodes.first_line: O Ahmad! Hearken unto the Call from the direction of Supreme Glory, from the Divine Lote-Tree beyond which there is no passing, upon the right hand of the luminous Spot, that verily [3.5s]... ...As for obligatory prayer, it hath been sent down by the Pen of the Most High in such wise that it setteth ablaze the hearts
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا احمد اسمع الندآء من شطر الکبریاء من سدره المنتهی عن یمین بقعه النورآء انه
subcodes.subjects: @law of fasting, @identity; relationship of Manifestation of God to God, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @station of the Manifestation of God
